independence_tier: provenance-disjoint (different submitter/lab/country); NOT methodology-independent (most submitters use CLSI broth microdilution)
leakage_control: all selected accessions are FRESH — excluded 979 accessions from 34 prior cohorts via the accession manifest (exact-self identity; excluded every cohort EXCEPT escherichia_coli_shigella_provdisjoint_tetracycline)
